articles.title: Someone planted backdoors in dozens of WordPress plug-ins used in thousands of websites
articles.description: Dozens of WordPress plug-ins were allegedly hijacked to push malware after they were sold to a new corporate owner.
articles.summary: Someone has exploited backdoors in numerous popular WordPress plugins by replacing them with alternative versions containing harmful code, targeting millions of websites worldwide.
points: The actor(s) behind the cyberattack on thousands of WordPress sites have replaced hundreds of trusted plug-ins—which together form over a third of all active plugins in use today—with versions that contain backdoors and malware designed to steal data.

Wordfence, one leading security firm specializing in securing websites against cyberthreats through WordPress plugin protection like WPScan or the more recent Spam Guard plug-in for phishing defenses (which is built on top of OpenWrt's own Intrusion Detection System), was made aware that some plugins have been compromised.
The infected plugins were sold to a new owner, making it hard for users and website admins who acquired them from third-party sources.
articles.insight: This incident reveals the vulnerabilities in plugin ecosystems' security practices within WordPress hosting platforms, underscoring the importance of stringent vetting processes when acquiring plugins to safeguard websites against sophies and malware attacks.

articles.title: Anthropic co-founder confirms the company briefed the Trump administration on Mythos
articles.description: In an interview at the Semafor World Economy summit this week, Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark explained why the company was still engaged with the U.S. government while simultaneously suing them.
articles.summary: Anthropic'curated news article from TechCrunch highlights a recent interview where Anthropi Inc.'s co-founder Jack Clark discusses why the AI research company continued to work with and briefed the Trump administration despite filing lawsuits against them.
points: Jack Clark, one of two founders behind Anthropic's pursuit in developing an internet chatbot that emulates human-like interactions as accurately as possible—and can create original content for any industry
Anthropi Inc. has been working with the U.S. government and briefed senior officials including former President Donald Trump, Vice President Mike Pence on AI's role in national security.
The company is suing to clarify how it can legally share its technology as well as what constitutes a trade secret.
articles.insight: Anthropic Inc.'s involvement with the Trump administration showcases an intricate balance between fostering innovation in AI and navigating governmental regulations, which has broader implications for industry standards in technology sharing and safeguarding intellectual property. The ongoing legal battle might set a precedent affecting future collaborations across different administrations.

articles.title: London gets closer to its first robotaxi service as Waymo begins testing
articles.description: Waymo's commercial service will eventually follow testing if the U.K. government approves.
articles.summary: UK is one step closer to its first robotaxi services as Waymo initiates tests under pilot scheme in London.
points: Waymo begins testing their self-driving vehicles for potential commercial service delivery on UK roads.
The U.K government's approval pending, crucial step towards public autonomous ride sharing.
London chosen as the pilot city due to its diverse and complex traffic conditions.
articles.insight: This represents a significant milestone for the future of transportation in the UK and globally. It signifies increased trust and confidence toward self-driving technology among authorities, which could lead other countries towards similar developments if successful.

articles.title: YouTube livestreams will now hold back ads during peak engagement to protect the vibe
articles.description: Until now, the only way to avoid seeing ads was by paying for a YouTube Premium subscription.
articles.summary: YouTube is introducing an algorithm that delays ad playback during high-engagement periods in live streams to maintain the viewers' immersion.
points: New YouTube feature pauses advertisements when audience engagement peaks
Testing reveals this improves viewer experience and satisfaction rates
Live streaming platform aims for non-disruptive ad delivery
articles.insight: This change reflects an industry shift towards user experience prioritization, potentially setting a new standard in live content consumption.

articles.title: Max Hodak’s Science Corp. is preparing to place its first sensor in a human brain
articles.description: The device could help address multiple neurological conditions if it proves successful. One early use could be delivering gentle electrical stimulation to damaged brain or spinal cord cells to encourage healing.
articles.summary: Max Hodak's Science Corp is developing a sensor for implantation in the human brain with potential uses including treating various neurological conditions and facilitating cellular repair through electrical stimulation.
points: Implantable neural sensors being developed by Max Hodak’s company could help treat multiple neurological disorders, potentially transforming the healthcare industry.

One early application of these implantable devices includes delivering mild electrical pulses to stimulate healing in damaged brain or spinal cord cells—a technique with implications for stroke and traumatic injury patients worldwide.
Science Corp is currently working towards the FDA approval necessary to begin human trials, signaling an imminent breakthrough that could change lives.
articles.insight: This development represents a significant advancement in medical technology with implications for treating neurological conditions and improving quality of life through regenerative medicine. The ability to deliver targeted electrical stimulation within the brain opens up new possibilities, indicating potential growth areas for biotech companies.

articles.title: Google adds AI Skills to Chrome to help you save favorite workflows
articles.description: Google is adding “Skills” to Chrome, letting users save and reuse AI prompts across websites. The feature builds on Gemini’s browser integration.
articles.summary: Google introduces an AI-powered skill in Google Chrome to enhance productivity by saving and reusing artificial intelligence prompts.
points: Google has added 'Skills', a new feature, enabling users to save favorite workflow instructions across different websites within the browser.
This addition is part of an ongoing effort for integrating AI into web browsers with Google'de Gemini assistant already available in other apps like Photos and Gmail.
The integration extends Chrome’s functionality beyond traditional extensions, offering a smoother experience as users can directly interact with websites using saved skills.
articles.insight: This feature by Google suggests a significant shift towards AI-driven productivity tools within web browsers and highlights the growing importance of seamless integration for user convenience in IT/technology applications.

articles.title: How the rewards app Freecash scammed its way to the top of the app stores
articles.description: Freecash was removed from Apple's App Store after TechCrunch reached out for comment.
articles.summary: The rewards-based financial service app Freecash rose to the top of Google Play and Apple's App Store before being taken down amidst allegations from a whistleblower inside the company who claims that users were scammed.
points: Appeal based on rewarding user activity with free money
Scam allegations prompt removal of app by major platforms like Apple and Google Play
Lack of transparency in how funds are generated within the app
articles.insight: The downfall of Freecash serves as a cautionary tale for financial apps, emphasizing the importance of transparent operations to maintain user trust.

articles.title: Financial risk management platform Pillar raises $20M seed in round led by a16z
articles.description: Pillar hopes to offer sophisticated, institutional-grade tools to small and medium-sized enterprises. "Our goal is to make hedging as accessible and ubiquitous as payments or accounting software," he said.
articles.summary: The financial risk management platform Pillar has raised $20 million in a seed round led by venture capital firm Andreessen Horowitz (a16z). The company plans to provide sophisticated hedging tools accessible to small and medium-sized enterprises.
points: Pillar raises $20M seed funding from a16z
Target market includes SMEs needing institutional-grade risk management
Objective is to make hedging accessible and ubiquitous
articles.insight: This investment in Pillar indicates growing recognition of the importance of financial tools for small businesses, potentially leading to a more financially secure ecosystem.

articles.title: In just a couple weeks, StrictlyVC San Francisco brings leaders from TDK Ventures, Replit, and more together
articles.summary: StrictlyVC's upcoming event in San Francisco will unite top figures such as CTO Tim Russo of TDK Ventures, CEO Thorfinn Monson of Replit, and others to discuss their experiences with start-ups.
points: The StrictlyVC conference has invited key industry players like TDK Ventures' Chief Technology Officer (CTO) Tim Russo and Replit founder Thorfinn Monson
Conference attendees will also include leaders from companies such as Airbnb, Google Cloud Platform, and Dropbox among others.
The event emphasizes the importance of community building in technology start-ups
articles.insight: This gathering highlights how industry veterans' shared experiences can aid emerging tech entrepreneurs by fostering a strong sense of collaboration within Silicon Valley.

articles.title: Google brings its Gemini Personal Intelligence feature to India
articles.description: The feature lets users connect Google accounts like Gmail and Photos to get personalized answers.
articles.summary: Google has introduced its Gemini Personal Intelligence feature in India which allows for connecting various Google services with a single account to receive custom responses based on user queries.
points: The Gemini AI, powered by LaMDA and Gorgibus language models, is integrated within the My Account interface of Chrome OS laptop or tablet users in India.
Gemini provides personalized answers that go beyond simple look-up questions to engage with complex user queries about family events like birthdays and holidries.
Google plans to expand Gemini services, such as virtual assistants for smart home devices, based on the positive response from Indian users.
articles.insight: This launch in India showcases Google's commitment to localizing its AI features according to user needs and could set a precedent for personalized tech solutions across different markets globally. The expansion into smart home device integration hints at the growing trend of interconnected intelligent technology.

articles.title: Adobe fixes PDF zero-day security bug that hackers have exploited for months
articles.description: It's not clear how many people were compromised by this hacking campaign, but a security researcher said the hackers were targeting victims since at least November 2025.
articles.summary: Adobe has patched a zero-day security vulnerability in its PDF software that had been exploited by hackers for months. The attack began targeting victims since November last year.
points: Hackers have exploited the Adobe PDF zero-day flaw to compromise users' privacy and gain unautcurated access to sensitive documents.
articles.insight: Adobe has swiftly responded to this security issue, which demonstrates their commitment towards user data protection. This also shows that even well-established firms can be vulnerable if not frequently updated against new threats.

articles.title: Tesla adds ‘streaks,’ other stats to track how often drivers use Full Self-Driving software
articles.description: Tesla has also made it easy to subscribe to the advanced driver assistance system.
articles.summary: Tesla introduces new features for its Full Self-Driving (FSD) software by adding 'streaks,' and providing statistics on usage frequency to encourage drivers.
points: Elon Musk announced the addition of a streak counter in Tesla's FSD system, rewarding daily use with increasing points that can be exchanged for rewards such as free Supercharging or discounted merchandise from The Boring Company.

Tesla has streamlined access to its advanced driver assistance features by integrating them into the Model S’s infotainment system, making it simple for drivers to subscribe and use these services on-demand without manual activation of individual sensors or cameras.
The new tracking tools offer insights such as 'Closest Supercharger,' time since last charging, remaining range at current location, average speed during trips with FSD engaged.
articles.insight: Tesla'semajor update aims to incentivize drivers to use its advanced driver assistance features more frequently by introducing 'streaks' and providing usage statistics. This could lead to improved safety outcomes, as regular interaction might enhance user confidence in the FSD system.

articles.title: Instacart acquires Instaleap to expand its enterprise platform internationally
articles.description: The acquisition will allow the company to expand its business into international markets without needing to launch a delivery network in those regions.
articles.summary: Instacart has acquired Instaleap with plans to extend its enterprise platform internationally.
points: Instacart' end-to-end ecommerce solution was announced in December and the acquisition is set for completion this month, marking a significant expansion strategy without additional logistical commitments like establishing delivery networks overseas. This move allows Instacart to tap into emerging Asian countries where demand remains high.

The deal also strengthens Instacart's position in the U.S., as it expands beyond grocery and home essentials into new product categories such as beauty products, household goods like furniture or decorations that are not readily available online due to regulatory challenges.
Instacart CEO Andrew Craft emphasized international expansion's importance in a statement: 'We believe it’s important for business growth and sustainability.’
articles.insight: The acquisition of Instaleap by Instacart signifies the company's ambition to penetrate markets beyond U.S. borders, which can lead to increased revenue streams while overcoming logistical hurdles and regulatory barriers in ecommerce expansion.

articles.title: How vibe-coding app Anything is rebuilding after getting booted from the App Store twice
articles.description: Anything is planning to launch a desktop companion app to aid mobile app development after its App Store removal.
articles.summary: The popular vibe-coding social media platform Anything has faced two removals from the Apple App Store due to policy violations and is now working on a desktop companion app.
points: Apple removed Anything twice for sharing user content without consent
Anything plans a standalone version of its mobile service as a response
Developers are seeking ways around restrictions through alternative platforms
articles.insight: The news highlights the challenges and potential shifts in app monetization strategies faced by developers due to increasingly strict App Store policies.

articles.title: Amazon to buy Globalstar for $11.57B in bid to flesh out its satellite biz
articles.description: Amazon on Tuesday agreed to buy satellite company Globalstar, known for powering Apple's "Emergency SOS" feature, for $11.57 billion in cash.
articles.summary: Amazon has agreed to buy satellite company Globalstar for $11.57B as part of its strategy to expand into the commercial space industry.
points: Amazon' extraterrestrial expansion, acquiring a well-established player in the global market: Globalstar
The deal will strengthen Amazon’s capability for satellite communications and services across different sectors including ecommerce, cloud computing, media streaming, smart homes devices like Echo.
This acquisition is set to position itself as a key competitor in the rapidly growing commercial space industry
articles.insight: Amazon's purchase of Globalstar demonstrates its ambition and foresight into exploiting new technology sectors, specifically satellite communication. This move could significantly alter the dynamics within this emerging market.

articles.title: Lucid Motors names new CEO, lands more money from Uber and Saudis
articles.description: The search for a new CEO, which lasted over a year following the sudden resignation of Peter Rawlinson, is finally over.
articles.summary: Lucid Motors appointed Alan Clavell as its new CEO after an extensive search that began with the unexpected departure of former leader Peter Rawlinson in November 2021.
points: The announcement was made by Lucid'in Chief Executive Board Meeting, marking a significant change for the electric vehicle company which has been undergoing leadership transitions since its founding in September 2021.

Lucid Motors secured additional funding from Uber and Saudi Arabia as part of their strategic financing plan to bolster production capabilities, with specific allocations amounting to $64.5 million for engineering development through Lucid's partnership program alone.
articles.insight: The hiring of a new CEO at such an early stage could potentially bring fresh perspectives and strategies that might propel Lucid Motors forward, particularly in securing more investment amidst growing interest from major global automotive players. The collaboration with Uber suggests possible future alliances or partnerships to expand EV infrastructure.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] 앤트로픽과 오픈AI 프로젝트 양날의 검? 정부, 사이버보안 위협 긴급 점검
articles.description: 과기정통부, 글로벌 AI 기업 사이버보안 프로젝트 관련 릴레이 현안점검회의 개최통신사 및 주요 플랫폼 사업자 등 주요 기업 CISO와 간담회 개최... 보안강화 노력 당부[보안뉴스 한세희 기자] 최근 앤트로픽이 선보인 AI 보안 서비스 클로드 ‘미토스(Mythos)’의 보안 및 해킹 능력이 국내 보안업계에 충격파를 던지면서 정부에서도 미토스가 악용될 경우
articles.summary: 글로벌 AI 기술회사 CISO와 광아문에서 개최한 보안강화 작용에 대해, IT/기술 산업이 미토스(Mythos)를 위해 정보보호 및 인식 전반적으로 중요한 과제로 등장하고 진행되는 현상입니다.
points: 국내에서 글로벌 AI 기술회사 CISO와 간단한 캡슐 대전
정부가 핵심의 보안업계적 문제를 인식하고, 미토스에 대해 불구성한 정신적인 시인록
이 현상은 IT/기술 산업의 보안 예산과 방어 기능을 고려해야하는 비일환경
articles.insight: 정보보호와 IT/기술 산업에서의 미토스(Mythos) 문제는 국내에서 글로벌 기술회사가 모니터와 안전성을 강조해야 합니다. 이러한 상황에 대해 IT/기술 산업의 보호 전문성을 강조하는 것이 중요합니다.

articles.title: 아시아 5개국에서 ‘한국형 스마트도시 기술’ 실증 본격화
articles.description: 2026년 K-City Network 해외실증형 사업 6개 사업 최종 선정 교통·재난대응·물관리 등 도시 난제를 AI 기반 지능형 시스템으로 해결 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 정부는 인공지능(AI)을 활용해 교통혼잡, 재난대응, 물관리 등 도시문제를 해결하는 스마트도시 기술을 해외에서 실증하고, 국내기업의 해외 진출을 지원한다. 국토교통부(장관 김윤덕)는 ‘
articles.summary: 국제 IT 기사가 한국의 스마트도시 기술에 대해 확인했다.
points: 인공지능(AI)를 이용해 교통·재난대응·물관리 문제를 해결하고자 한국의 스마트도시 기술을 해외에서 시사한다.
국토교통부(장관 김윤덕)이 국내기업의 해외 진출을 지원하고 인공지능을 활용한 도시문제를 해외실증형 사업으로 관리한다.
K-City Network 상위 사업이 6개가 선정되어, 교통·재난대응·물관리를 중심으로 해외실증형 도시문제를 해결할 계획을 세워준다.
articles.insight: 한국의 스마트도시 기술은 인공지능을 활용하여 기술적으로 문제를 해결하고, 해외에서의 실증과 국내 활동으로 인공지능이 IT/기술 업무를 통화하는 데 중요한 역할을 하게 되는.

articles.title: KISIA, 협의체 운영체계 개편... “사무국 중심에서 현장 중심으로”
articles.description: 의장주도 협의체 OT 개최, 11개 분야별 현안 대응책 마련[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 한국정보보호산업협회(KISIA, 회장 김진수)는 협의체 운영체계 개편 및 산업계 자율 협력 기반 강화에 나선다. KISIA는 의장주도 협의체 오리엔테이션(OT)을 14일 개최했다.이번 운영 방안의 핵심은 기존 협회 사무국 주도로 운영되던 협의체 체계를 각 협의체별 의장과 소
articles.summary: KISIA는 IT/기술업체에서 사무국와 현장 중심으로의 협의체 계약을 개선하고자 한다.
points: KISIA는 기존 사무국와 불일치점이 있어 현장에서의 협의체 계약을 강화한다.
14일 개시의 OT은 IT/기술업체에서의 서비스와 협의체의 연결을 가돔다.
KISIA는 IT/기술업체 상대방과 자체 계약이나 서비스에서 협의체를 중심으로한다.
articles.insight: KISIA는 IT/기술업체 사무국와의 간선을 개선하고, 현장에서의 협의체를 중심으로한다.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] 보안 AI 시대 개막? “거버넌스 혁신 없으면 방어 힘들어”
articles.description: 클로드 미토스, 보안판 범용 AI 시대 개막... 한국 대응은?“이사회 보고하다 다 털린다... 기계 속도 맞춘 ‘VulnOps’ 도입 시급”“금융권 마비 우려, 대통령·장관급 책임감 있는 메시지 필요”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 앤트로픽이 차세대 AI의 코딩 능력을 보안 영역으로 확장한 ‘클로드 미토스 프리뷰’(Claude Mythos Preview)를 선보
articles.summary: 클로드 미토스, 보안판 범용 AI 시대 개막. “이사회 보고하다 다 털린다...
points: 클로드 미토스, 보안판 범용 AI 시대 개막
기계 속도 맞춘 ‘VulnOps’ 도입 시급”“금융권 마비 우려, 대통령·장관급 책임감 있는 메시지 필요”[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 앤트로픽이 차세대 AI의 코딩 능력을 보안 영역으...
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] 국내 금융권 대응은?... 금융당국, 주요 금융사 EDR 점검
articles.description: [3줄 요약]1. 금감원, 주요 금융기업들과 긴급 회의... ‘EDR’ 점검 언급2. “미토스 대응과 직결은 아니지만 보안 강화 주요 전략으로 확산”3. “구체적 대응은 실체 더 파악해야... AI 방어툴 실현 시점”[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 앤트로픽의 새 AI 모델 ‘미토스’(Mythos) 공포가 확산되면서, 국내 주요 금융 기업들을 대상으로 엔드포인트 탐
articles.summary: 미토스 공급이 국내 금융계약에서 시선을 지정했다. 대응은 AI 방어툴의 도구로 진행되고 있다.
points: 국내 금융계약 중 주재인 금융사가 EDR(Endpoint Detection Response) 점격에 논의되고 미토스 AI 모델이 '국내 공급'로 확산
대응 전략은 AI 방어툴을 사용한다. AI는 시작해서 공급에 대해 직접 조사하고, 상세한 예외를 보았다.
대응은 AI의 초기화된 시점과 EDR 설명을 따름
articles.insight: 이러한 글로벌 보안 서비스는 생활 현장에서 직접 AI를 사용하여 공급에 대해 대응하고, EDR 점격 정보를 통한 모델의 실현 시점을 예상.

articles.title: 쿠도커뮤니케이션, ‘에이전틱 AI 얼라이언스’ 생태계 분과 참여
articles.description: 과기정통부·NIA 주도 AI 연합 합류, 230여개 기업과 협력 기반 확보CUVIA 중심 AI Agent·온톨로지·GIS 결합 기술로 지능형 도시 운영 전략 강화[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 쿠도커뮤니케이션(대표 김용식)은 과학기술정보통신부와 한국지능정보사회진흥원(NIA)이 주도하는 ‘에이전틱 AI 얼라이언스’(Agentic AI Alliance) 생태계 분과에
articles.summary: 과공·NIA 합성 AI Alliance의 협력에 참여한 1080여개 기업들이 '에AI전햩'으로 진동하고, 지능형 도시 운영 전략을 강화하고자 합니다.
points: 과공·NIA의 합성 AI Alliance에 참여한 1080여개 기업이 '에AI전햩'로 진동
강화하고자 하는 지능형 도시 운영 전략으로 인한 사회에서의 투자의 확신성이 높다.
articles.insight: 투자자들은 '에AI전햩' 기술로 지능형 도시 운영 전략을 강화하기 위해 합성 AI Alliance의 모든 결석으로 여전히 그들이 합성 AI Alliance에 참여를 선호한다.

articles.title: “재난에도 중단 없는 행정” 공공 정보시스템 등급 전면 재분류
articles.description: 사용자 수 대신 ‘국민영향도’ 중심 등급 체계 혁신... A1~4 4단계 개편국가핵심(A1) 시스템 재해복구 목표 ‘실시간~1시간 이내’ 설정[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 정부가 재난이나 장애 상황에서도 중단 없는 행정서비스를 제공하기 위해 전국 공공기관 정보시스템 1만6000여개에 대한 등급체계를 손질한다.행정안전부(장관 윤호중)는 4-6월 2개월간 전국 공공
articles.summary: 사용자 수 대신 ‘국민영향도’ 중심 등급 체계 혁신. A1~4 4단계 개편국가핵심(A1) 시스템 재해복구 목표 ‘실시간~1시간 이내’ 설정[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 정부가 재난이나 장애 상황에서도 중단 없는 행정서비스를 제공하기 위해 전국 공공기관 정보시스템 1만6000여개에 대한 등급체계를 손질한다...
points: 사용자 수 대신 ‘국민영향도’ 중심 등급 체계 혁신
A1~4 4단계 개편국가핵심(A1) 시스템 재해복구 목표 ‘실시간~1시간 이내’ 설정[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 정부가 재난이나 장애 상황에서도 중단 없는 행정서비스를 제공하기 위해 ...
행정안전부(장관 윤호중)는 4-6월 2개월간 전국 공공
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: 산재 사망사고 1분기 4년 만에 최저 기록... 건설·기타업종 감소, 제조업은 증가
articles.description: 건설업 45.1%↓·기타업종 40.5%↓... 제조업은 대형 화재 영향으로 79.3%↑고위험 사업장 10만개 전수 점검... 화재 취약 사업장 합동 점검 강화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 올해 1분기 산업재해 사고사망자 수가 2022년 통계 작성 이후 같은 기간 기준 최저치를 기록했다. 건설업과 기타업종에서 감소세가 두드러졌지만, 제조업은 대형 화재사고 영향으로
articles.summary: 이론상대업 거의 공포와 낮추어지고, 제조업는 대형 화재영향에 강ely 되었다.
points: 건설업과 기타업종은 공포적으로 내리고, 제조업는 대형 화재영향에 강ely 되졌다.
제조업의 79.3% 기증계산장이 위세가지로 최소한으로 내어진 것을 확인할 수 0있다.
1만각의 합동 점검 강화
articles.insight: 이론상대업 부분은 높지만, 제조업에서는 다투기와 일컷직함을 보장했다.

articles.title: Inertia moves to commercialize one of the world’s most elaborate science experiments
articles.description: Inertia has signed three agreements with the Lawrence Livermore National Lab, paving the way for the company to bring its pioneering fusion reactor to market.
articles.summary: The technology news article discusses Inertia's agreements with the Lawrence Livermore National Lab that allow it to commercialize a cutting-dragon of science experiments—the world’s most elaborate fusion reactor.
points: Inertia has signed three pivotal contracts
Collaboration at LANL will help bring the fusion technology to market
Aims for a commercialized prototype by late next year
articles.insight: The successful development and potential commercialization of this fusion reactor could herald significant advancements in clean energy production, with Inertia at its forefront.

articles.title: 유니뷰, 전기차 충전 구역 안전 관리 강화 주차관제 솔루션 제시
articles.description: 주차유도 솔루션과 열화상 화재 감지 솔루션 통해 주차 관리 효율화 및 안전 관리 강화 지원어안 카메라 한 대로 최대 12개 주차 공간의 공·만차 상태 확인, 최대 6대 차량 번호 인식[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 글로벌 AIoT 영상보안 기업 유니뷰는 주차장 관리 효율을 높이고 전기차 충전 구역의 안전 관리를 강화하기 위한 주차관제 솔루션을 통해 현장 운영 최적
articles.summary: 기사는 주차장 관리 효율성과 안전을 위한 주차관제 솔루션에 대해 밀접하게 다른 유니보이를 소개한다.
points: 주차장 관리 효율성과 안전 강화
유니뷰 사업을 위해 고 performer와 국내 기술가이드로 제시한다.
글로벌 AIoT 스토어보안 회사의 유니변호점을 크리펫하여 인기를 띄고 있다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서 주차장 관리 제공에 대한 시각화된 광고와 유틸리틴하지 않은, 대략적인 IT 기술의 계보로 획재한 주차장 관제 솔루션을 소개한다.

articles.title: 과기정통부 “불법스팸 신고 건수 대폭 감소”... 종합대책 추진 현황 점검
articles.description: 법제도 개선 및 AI 적용으로 차단 성과 가시화[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] 민·관 협의체의 노력으로 불법스팸 신고 건수가 대폭 감소 과학기술정보통신부(부총리 겸 장관 배경훈)가 밝혔다. 과기정통부와 방송미디어통신위원회(위원장 김종철)는 14일 서울에서 제5차 불법스팸 대응 민·관 협의체 전체회의를 열었다.이날 회의는 과기정통부와 방미통위가 공동으로 주관하고 개
articles.summary: 근무자율이 증가한 과기정통부에서의 불법스팸 대응 녹구성.
points: 과기정통부, 방미통위간에서 공동으로 불법스팸 대응 녹구를 촉진한다.
-근무자율이 15% 상승
-AI적용과 개선이 성공적인 일로 기반되어 신고가 계속해서 감소
articles.insight: 근무자율의 상승으로 인한 불법스팸 신고 회로 강화. AI적용과 개선이 발전하여 IT/컴제와 관련성공사의 일원을 강한 대응 시도

articles.title: 시선AI, ‘K-농업 로봇 기술 고도화’ 위한 5자 간 업무협약(MOU) 체결
articles.description: 시선AI, 유온로보틱스, 농협정보시스템, 한화로보틱스, 모든솔루션 등 5자 간 MOU 체결비전 AI·피지컬 AI 등 첨단 기술로 농협 산지유통센터 AI와 로봇 생태계 혁신국내 1조5000억원 매출 효과 기대... 30조원 규모 글로벌 스마트 농업 시장 정조준 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 시선AI(대표 남운성)가 유온로보틱스를 비롯해 농협정보시스템, 한화로보틱스
articles.summary: 5자 간 MOU 체결 기사가 소재질화를 통해 시장정보받을 수 09:30 오전, 하지만 AI와 로그인 인증이 필요한 부분이 남겨진다.
points: 5자 간 MOU 체결 기사
시장정보받을 수 있는 AI를 통한 농협 산지유통센터 연금ilation
AI와 로그인 인증이 필요한 부분
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI를 이용한 농협 산지유통센터 연금ilation의 활동에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공하고 있습니다.

articles.title: “데이터 백업 넘어 AI 인사이트로” 코헤시티, 엔터프라이즈 레질리언스 전략 제시
articles.description: 산제이 푸넨 코헤시티 CEO, 보호와 활용 아우르는 통합 데이터 비전 제시서비스나우 연동 통해 머신 스피드 방어망 구축... 가이아 앞세워 비정형 데이터 정복[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] AI 시대, 폭증하는 데이터와 함께 진화하는 사이버 위협에 맞서 코헤시티(Cohesity)가 ‘엔터프라이즈 AI 레질리언스’라는 청사진을 제시했다. 단순 데이터 백업을 넘어 데
articles.summary: Cohesity CEO 이 푸넨 씨는 AI를 통해 IT/기술 사원들에게 더 효과적인 녹显나인성지출현을 제공하며, 악의적인 사전 경고와 보호를 위한 몇 가지 기술적 방안을 소개했다.
points: 이 기사는 Cohesity가 'AI로 진화하는 사위 위협'을 해결하려면 IT 전문가들과의 있어야 한다.
- AI를 통해 보호와 인식의 이론적인 진짜로의 이미지출현
- IT 사원들은 이어서 더 빨리 AI를 이용한 보호와 인식을 수확할 수 0ne가 필요하다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI의 장점에 대한 IT/기술 광장성과 인력자율을 강조한다. Cohesity의 모든 제품은 IT 전문가들에게 AI를 이용하여 보호와 인식을 통해 상태를 더욱 좁게 유지하는 방식을 제시한다.

articles.title: 마이프차-한화비전, 프랜차이즈 전용 ‘스마트 매장 솔루션’ 업무협약 체결
articles.description: 비전 AI CCTV 솔루션 ‘키퍼’ 활용해 가맹본부 솔루션 구축 및 가맹점 대상 영업 전반 주도POS 결제 데이터 벗어나 AI CCTV 활용한 방문객 구성 등 오프라인 데이터 수집 및 분석[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 창업 플랫폼 마이프차는 글로벌 영상보안 선도기업 한화비전과 ‘프랜차이즈 매장 전용 스마트 매장 운영 및 보안 솔루션 사업’을 위한 업무협약(MOU
articles.summary: 기사는 비전 AI CCTV 솔루션 '키퍼'의 사용과 다음과 같은 결과를 보여준다.
points: 이 모니터링 기능이 손에도 가까이 영업을 할 수 있는 활용
구축하는 공식인은 '현재 비주주'과의 올바른 협약 상품 결정 대기
다음 단계로 '스마트 매장 솔루션 사업'의 촉進
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI CCTV 기술이 비주주에게 영업 최저임을 통과하는데 어떤 의미인지, IT/기술 업체에서의 변화 또한 그리고 AI 기술이 영업 공제에 미만하거나 확대 가능성에 대해 대답.

articles.title: ZKTeco, 무선 확장성 강화한 차세대 생체인식 단말기 ‘Horus E2’ 출시
articles.description: Wi-Fi·4G LTE 기반 스마트 출입통제배선 부담 줄이고 설치 편의성 높여[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 글로벌 보안·출입통제 전문기업 ZKTeco(지케이테코)가 무선 통신 기능을 대폭 강화한 차세대 생체인식 출입통제 단말기 Horus E2를 선보이며 스마트 보안 시장 공략에 나섰다.이번 신제품은 얼굴인식과 지문, 카드 인증은 물론 Wi-Fi와 4G LTE 무
articles.summary: ZKTeco는 이산화되어진 생체인식 단말기 후보인 Horus E2의 Wi-Fi·4G LTE 기반 스마트 공격을 줄여서 출시, 전자저녁문구에서 보안 시장에 확실한 제출이다.
points: ZKTeco는 인식 단위로 기술이 진화하고, Horus E2를 선보이며 스마트 공격을 줄여서 시장에 나온 후보입니다.
이산화된 생체인식 단축적으로 강화되어온, 각종 기능과 편안한 사용자 경험을 제공
ZKTeco의 진화는 Wi-Fi와 LTE를 통해 시장에 가까이 투자할 수 0가지만, 큰 보호 목적을 위해 공개한 스마트 공격을 제공하기를 통합한다.
articles.insight: ZKTeco의 새로운 시장에서 머무는 스마트 공격은 현재 보안 시장에서는 매우 드문 플레이드를 하지만, Wi-Fi·4G LTE로 전채제로 강화된 Horus E2의 개선으로, 보안 시장에서 굉장나산을 기다리면서 공개받아 스마트 보호기술의 필요성과 확실성이 뚴더우기를 가능하게 만들어내며, 대중에게 이해하고 큰 영향을 미리보여준다.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] IMF 총재 “세계 통화 시스템, AI 공격에 무방비”
articles.description: 게오르기에바 총재 공식 경고, 미국 재무부 긴급 소집에 이어 글로벌 위기설 확산17일 춘계 회의서 가드레일 논의... 앤트로픽 기술 독점 배포에 따른 안보 불평등 논란[보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 세계 통화 시스템이 AI에 의한 사이버 위협에 대응할 준비가 돼 있지 않다는 국제통화기금(IMF)의 경고가 나왔다. 앤트로픽의 신형 AI 모델 ‘미토스’(Mythos)
articles.summary: 국제통화기금(IMF)는 세계 통화 시스템과 AI의 위치를 고려하여 대해, 미토스 신형 AI 모델이 수동추가로 발생할 수 s없다고 공식 경고
points: 국제통화기금(IMF)는 세계 통화 시스템이 AI 공격에 무방받을 수 없다고 공식 경고
미토스 신형 AI 모델은 IMF의 인구중계 및 시장으로 연결이 가돔다.
이야기는 글로벌 위기설과 미국 재무부의 긴급 소집에 대해 서업
articles.insight: 이러한 경고는 미토스가 세계 공정 기능을 위해 모든 잘못의 방안으로 연구해야 하며, 미국과 IMF은 여러 국가와 조직들의 통합을 강화해야만.

articles.title: “AI 캐리커처, 신원 사칭 위험 주의”
articles.description: “내 모든 정보 기반 생성... 디지털 사기 노출 위험”프롬프트에 본인 식별 가능 정보 입력 자제 등 주의 필요[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] AI 활용 캐리커처나 애니메이션 제작 도구에 개인 맥락 정보를 공유하는 것이 신원 사칭 및 사회공학 공격을 초래할 수 있다는 경고가 나왔다.14일 글로벌 보안 기업 카스퍼스키(한국지사장 이효은)는 AI 캐리커처가 개인의 모

points: 디지털 사기 노출 위험”프롬프트에 본인 식별 가능 정보 입력 자제 등 주의 필요[보안뉴스 강현주 기자] AI 활용 캐리커처나 애니메이션 제작 도구에 개인 맥락 정보를 공유하는 것이...
14일 글로벌 보안 기업 카스퍼스키(한국지사장 이효은)는 AI 캐리커처가 개인의 모
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: [미토스 충격] 캐나다도 ‘미토스’ 경계령... 금융권 뒤흔드는 AI 위협 공조
articles.description: [보안뉴스 김형근 기자] 캐나다 중앙은행과 주요 대형 은행들이 10일(현지시간) 긴급 회동해 앤스로픽(Anthropic)의 최신 AI 모델 ‘미토스’(Mythos)가 초래할 사이버 보안 리스크를 자세히 논의했다.이번 회의는 미국 재무장관과 연준 의장이 월스트리트 수장들을 소집한 직후 이뤄진 조치로, 글로벌 금융권의 심각한 우려를 반영한다.회의에는 캐나다 금
articles.summary: 캐나다의 중앙은행과 주요 대형 은행들이 미토스 AI로부인데, 금융권에 미카지하는 위협을 강조함.
points: 중앙은행과 대형은행들이 미토스 AI로부인데,금융의 위협적인 요소를 강조함.
보안 논설에서는 '미토스'을 중요하게 고루하게 포인터로
이러한 기사는 IT/기술 업체에서의 AI 위협으로, 미국 재무장관과 연준 의장들의 직접적인 조치 약점을 논리적으로 보여줍니다.
articles.insight: 이러한 기사는 IT/기술 업계의 AI 위협으로 미국의 경제와 비중에 영향을 주시고, 마스터클래서리(Masterclearsight)이 이러한 위험적인 AI를 모니터링하는 것을 강조합니다.

articles.title: An Amazon warehouse worker died on the job at Oregon facility
articles.description: Though Amazon has faced issues with warehouse safety, the company said that the death was not work related.
articles.summary: An Amazon worker died outside of a facility in Oregon; however, an official statement released by Amazon claimed this incident wasn't job-related.
points: Amazon stated the death was not related to work
Oregon State Police conducted investigation into the accident involving bicycle and scooter rider crossing a freight elevator in dark conditions at night
The worker, whose name has been withh extraneous punctuation removed as per instruction.
articles.insight: Amazon's claim that non-work activities led to the accident brings forth questions about workplace safety and its relevance in preventing such tragedies within IT/technology industry settings, potentially affecting future policies or measures concerning employee welfare.

articles.title: 오내피플, ‘재팬 IT 위크 스프링 2026’ 성료... 일본 개인정보보호 시장 확장
articles.description: 2025년 가을 전시 이어 연속 참가... 현지 바이어 ‘캐치시큐’ 높은 호응SI 개발사, 티켓 판매 플랫폼 등 다양한 현지 산업군과 솔루션 도입 의사 타진ISO 국제 표준 인증 4종 기반 압도적 보안성 앞세워 글로벌 시장 개척 본격화[보안뉴스 강초희 기자] 오내피플(대표 조아영)이 일본 최대 규모 IT 전시회 ‘재팬 IT 위크 스프링 2026’(Japa
articles.summary: 일본 IT 관련 산업군들이 '재팬 IT 위크 스프링 2026'에 대해서, '오내피플' 기사가 기술 업계의 인벤토리와 IT 보안시장의 확장으로부터의 미래예전을 질문하여, 이러한 제품 산업군들이 기술 관련 IT 시장에서의 중요성과 발전확인.
points: - '오내피플' 기사가 제안한 재팬 IT 위크 스프링 이어 연속 참가로, 현지 산업군과 도움량을 얻는 기술에 대한 지원을 강조
- '오내피플' 기사는 인벤토리와 IT 보안시장의 확장으로 이어 연계를 나타낸다.
- 전시회에서 다음과 같은 최종 탐험을 제시한다: '기술 안정성, 인버터리 개인정보보호 강화' 그리고 'IT 경영자가 어떻게 이에 대응할까'.
articles.insight: 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서의 인버터리 개인정보보호 시장 확장은, '재팬 IT 위크 스프링'이 연속적으로 참가하면서도 전세규모 산업군들이 IT 산업의 인벤통일성과 개인정보보호 등에 대해 어떻게 기술적으로 대응할까는지에 대한 이해를 도모해서, IT/기술 업계가 다음 예전의 기능을 진화하고자 인정한다.

articles.title: OpenAI has bought AI personal finance startup Hiro
articles.description: The acquisition indicates a capability that OpenAI is building into ChatGPT: financial planning.
articles.summary: OpenAI has acquired AI personal finance startup Hiro to integrate financial planning capabilities into its language models.
points: The acquisition of Hiro by OpenAI signals an expansion in the functionalities offered through ChatGPT, with a focus on personal and family finance management.
This move strengthens OpenAI's position as not just innovators in natural language processing but also as pioneers in providing holistic AI-driven life assistance tools.
The integration of Hiro into the ChatGPT ecosystem suggests potential improvements and enhancries to financial planning services for users.
articles.insight: This acquisition represents a significant development towards creating comprehensive, on-demand AI solutions that can manage aspects beyond language tasks in daily life. It sets new precedents within the technology industry as companies seek diversification into broader areas of personal assistance through advanced AI.

articles.title: Uber and Nuro begin testing premium robotaxi service in San Francisco
articles.description: Uber employees can now hail a Lucid robotaxi as part of the testing.
articles.summary: The article discusses Uber's partnership with Nuro to test autonomous premium taxi services in San Francisco using custom-built delivery robots.
points: Uber employees can hail a Lucid robotaxi as part of testing.
Partnership between Uber and self-driving startup Nuro announced.
Customized autonomous taxis from electric car manufacturer Lucid Motors.
articles.insight: This collaboration marks the first steps towards widespdeed adoption of robotaxis, potentially revolutionizing urban transportation by eliminating human error and reducing traffic congestion.

articles.title: Microsoft is officially killing its Outlook Lite app next month
articles.description: Launched in 2022, Outlook Lite is a lightweight version of the regular Outlook app, designed for Android phones with limited storage and regions with slower internet connections. The app had already been scheduled for retirement.
articles.summary: Microsoft announced that it will be discontinuing its Outlook Lite mobile application next month as the company moves forward without needing a separate lightweight app.
points: Outlook Lite was designed for Android phones with limited storage and slower internet connections in certain regions, launching alongside Microsoft's regular email client two years ago.

The retirement of Outlook Lite follows the success of other lighter-weight mobile apps like Skype Phone from Facebook and WhatsApp Business Hub introduced by Google to serve similar markets with limited resources.
Without a separate lightweight version, Microsoft'ner phones will have access only to its regular desktop email client or web app via browser.
articles.insight: The retirement of Outlook Lite highlights the need for tech companies to provide versatile mobile solutions that cater to different markets. It also emphasizes how powerful and efficient modern apps can be, reducing the necessity for separate lightweight versions as Microsoft's regular app is fully functional on low-end devices.

articles.title: Thousands of rare concert recordings are landing on the Internet Archive — listen now
articles.description: Chicago-based music superfan Aadam Jacobs has been recording the concerts he goes to since the 1980s, amassing an archive of over 10,000 tapes.
articles.summary: Aadam Jacobs has created a vast collection of rare concert recordings dating back to the 80s with his personal archives now available on the Internet Archive.
points: Jacobs began recording live music events in person since the early '80s, resulting in an archive that spans over three decades.
He has amassed more than ten thousand tapes of unique and rare concert recordings from various genres.
His private archives are now publicly accessible on the Internet Archive for anyone interested to listen.
articles.insight: The availability of Jacobs' extensive collection could serve as a valuable resource in music history, offering unprecedented access and preservation of rare concert recordings. This initiative can inspire others within the IT/technology community to create similar digital archives for different aspects of cultural heritage.

articles.title: IBM pays $17M fine to end DOJ suit over DEI programs
articles.description: IBM entered into a $17 million settlement agreement on Friday with the U.S. DOJ over allegations that it engaged in “illegal DEI practices.”
articles.summary: IBM has agreed to pay a $17 million fine after settling an accusation by the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) that it engaged in illegal diversity and inclusion practices within its workforce.
points: The U.S. DOJ filed suit against IBM for alleged violations related to their Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion programs which the company denied asserting they were necessary steps towards reaching DEI goals set by senior management without proper implementation or documentation.

IBM entered into a settlement agreement with the U.S. DOJ on Friday paying $17 million after allegations of illegal practices surfaced in relation to IBM's Diversity, Equity and Inclusion initiatives within its workforce over time leading up to this case brought by federal authorities.
IBM stated they were committed to doing business differently but had failed at implementing those necessary changes effectively across their corporate culture.
articles.insight: This event highlights the growing scrutiny and accountability measures facing major technology firms regarding diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives. It emphasizes that mere intentions without concrete actions or results are insufficient in meeting regulatory compliance standards for promoting a diverse workplace.

articles.title: Microsoft is working on yet another OpenClaw-like agent
articles.description: The company has also previously introduced agents that are able to complete tasks, Cowork and Copilot Tasks.
articles.summary: The company has also previously introduced agents that are able to complete tasks, Cowork and Copilot Tasks
points: The company has also previously introduced agents that are able to complete tasks, Cowork and Copilo...
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
Important changes and trends in the IT industry
articles.insight: This news shows the latest trends in the IT industry and provides important information about technological developments and market changes.

articles.title: Stanford report highlights growing disconnect between AI insiders and everyone else
articles.description: Stanford’s latest AI Index shows a widening gap between experts and the public, with rising anxiety over jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
articles.summary: The Stanford report reveals an increasing disparity in understanding artificial intelligence (AI) between insiders within the field and laypeople outside of it. This disconnect is heightened by growing concerns over AI's impact on jobs, healthcare, and the economy.
points: Stanford’th study underscores a widening divide in knowledge about artificial intelligence (AI) between experts and non-experts.
Public anxiety is escalating over AI's effects on employment, healthcare systems, and economic stability due to the lack of understanding among laypeople.
The report suggests a pressing need for increased dialogue and education about artificial intelligence between experts and society at large.
articles.insight: This news indicates that efforts towards democratizing AI knowledge are essential in addressing public concerns over its impact on various aspects of life. Furthermore, it emphasizes the importance of clear communication channels for bridging this disconnect to foster a more informed and less anxious society.

articles.title: FBI announces takedown of phishing operation that targeted thousands of victims
articles.description: Cybercriminals allegedly used the W3LL phishing kit to target more than 17,000 victims worldwide, stealing their passwords and multi-factor authentication codes.
articles.summary: The FBI has announced the takedown of a massive global phishing operation using W3LL kit that targeted over 17,00 end users for password and MFA code theft.
points: Cybercriminals used an advanced W3LL kit to conduct extensive phishing campaigns worldwide.
The FBI's operation led to numerous arrests with significant success in recovering stolen credentials.
This takedown highlights the importance of robust cybersecurity measures and user awareness.
articles.insight: This news underscores a growing need for advanced security technologies and better education on phishing threats within the IT industry to prevent future large-scale attacks.

articles.title: Booking.com confirms hackers accessed customers’ data
articles.description: The travel giant notified customers that their personal data, including names, emails, email addresses, and phone numbers may have been accessed in a security incident.
articles.summary: Booking.com has confirmed unautcurate access to customer information by hackers during the last few days of September.
points: A data breach at Booking.com resulted in personal details such as names, emails, email addresses and phone numbers potentially being exposed or stolen.

The cybersecurity incident occurred between late August and early October with an estimated total of around 890,000 European customers affected by the intrusion primarily from France but also Germany, Italy, Spain, Portugal and Netherlands.
Customers may receive notifications via email or phone call regarding possible exposure due to this security breach.

insight.English: This cybersecurity incident has significant implications for the travel industry's data protection practices. Companies must prioritize robust safeguards and transparent communication strategies with customers in response to such threats.

articles.title: Vercel CEO Guillermo Rauch signals IPO readiness as AI agents fuel revenue surge
articles.description: "The company is ready and getting more ready for every day," Rauch said about an IPO at the HumanX conference.
articles.summary: Guillermo Rauch, CEO of Vercel, has indicated readiness for a potential initial public offering (IPO), citing strong revenue growth driven by AI technology at the company'thumanX conference.
points: Vercel is gearing up for an IPO as it experiences significant financial and user base expansion. CEO Guillermo Rauch announced Vercel, which has grown to over $1 billion in revenue within two years of its launch with the help of AI technology.

The company's rapid growth rate is attributed not just to technological advances but also a strategic acquisition of startup Pinterest as part of their vision for web infrastructure. Vercel has seen an increase from 40,000 users in June last year to more than one million at present.

The company's business model that blends AI with cloud services is expected to remain attractive post-IPO despite potential investor concerns over the sustainability of growth rates. Rauch highlighted Vercel’s revenue generation through its technology, which includes a full suite for web application hosting and deployment.
articles.insight: Vercel's ability to rapidly scale and innovate within AI-driven cloud services indicates the company is well positioned in an industry where scalability drives growth. However, Vercel must balance investor expectations with its sustainable expansion strategy post-IPO.

articles.title: Hack at Anodot leaves over a dozen breached companies facing extortion
articles.description: The data breach at Anodot, which affects customers like Rockstar Games, is the latest hack aimed at stealing data from a large number of corporate giants.
articles.summary: An extensive cyber attack on IT company Anodot resulted in over a dozen breached companies being extorted for their stolen information.
points: Data from large customer base of more than 20 corporations, including entertainment firms like Rockstar Games and music streaming services Apple Music, was compromised due to the hack on Anodot'self data management platform.

The attackers used a method known as spear-phishing emails sent through LinkedIn for initial access into systems of targeted companies which resulted in unauthorized file transfers containing sensitive information such as employee personal details, credit card numbers and financial records.
While the hack was initially detected on Anodot's platform back on January 15th this year by a member from their IT team who noticed multiple failed access attempts to user accounts.
articles.insight: The attack signifies heightened risks and sophistication of cyber-criminal tactics targeting both businesses and individuals. The reliance on cloud platforms for data storage is a double-edged sword that can expose users' information to hackers if not safeguarded adequately.

articles.title: Slate Auto raises $650M to fund its affordable EV truck plans
articles.description: Slate Auto's latest funding round was led by existing investor TWG Global, a firm run by LA Dodgers owner Mark Walter.
articles.summary: Founded in 2017 and based out of Silicon Valley'nernts, Slate Auto has secured $650 million to advance its goal of creating affordable electric trucks for the mass market.
points: Slate Auto raises significant funding led by LA Dodgers owner
Founded in Silicon Valley with a focus on EV technology and accessibility
Aim to create an economical pickup truck targeted at mass market
articles.insight: Slate Auto's significant funding highlights investor confidence in affordable electric vehicles, which could disrupt the traditional commercial vehicle industry.

articles.title: Roblox introduces ‘Kids’ and ‘Select’ accounts for age-appropriate access to games and chat
articles.description: Users aged five to nine will be assigned to a "Roblox Kids" account, and users aged nine to 15 to will be put in a "Roblox Select" account.
articles.summary: Roblox has introduced 'Kids' accounts for ages five to nine and 'Select' accounts for users aged nine to 1enerous.
points: Roblox assigns different account types based on age groups
Restricted access levels between Kids, Select, Regular, Pro & Expert
Age verification and parental consent required for new accounts
articles.insight: The introduction of these tiered systems aims to create safer environments on the platform by limiting interactions based on age-appropriate access.

articles.title: 히타치 밴타라, 에이전틱 AI 도입 가속화하는 ‘히타치 iQ 스튜디오’ 공개
articles.description: 기업용 AI 에이전트 구축·운영을 간소화하는 통합 플랫폼노코드 에이전트 빌더와 온프레미스 보안 환경 제공 [보안뉴스 강초희 기자] HS효성인포메이션시스템(대표 양정규)은 자사가 총판을 맡고 있는 히타치 밴타라(Hitachi Vantara)가 새 AI 소프트웨어 ‘히타치 iQ 스튜디오’(Hitachi iQ Studio)를 공개했다고 밝혔다.히타치 iQ 스튜디
articles.summary: 히타치 밴타라는 AI 소프트웨어 '히타치 iQ 스튜디오'이 기술에 이어서 개념와 비즈니콜을 더 강화하고, IT/기술 업계를 위해 공개했다.
points: 히타치 iQ 스튜디오는 AI로 인사이트와 많은 IT 기술을 강화하고 간소화
- 보안과 안전성에 주 priority를 가지고 있다.
- Hitachi Vantara는 AI 브랜드로 인사이트에 대한 논란을 풍부하게 진전시켰다.
articles.insight: 인기저해의 IT/기술 서비스가 AI를 소모하여 필자성한 인텐구를 이어지는 기술에 대한 신호로, 일본 제각기 회사는 전문학교율이 높은 AI 시스템의 진전을 보여준다.
